changelog: Separated SaaS managed deployments from the self-hosted public update channel
Disabled in-app ZIP update controls when FoxDesk runs as a managed SaaS deployment
Added explicit FOXDESK_EDITION and FOXDESK_UPDATE_CHANNEL defaults for production SaaS containers
Redesigned the SaaS operator console as a standalone control plane for workspaces, billing state, migrations, and tenant lifecycle
Removed internal unit economics and margin copy from public/operator screens
Improved platform admin responsive layout with mobile-safe workspace cards and search
Aligned FoxDesk Cloud public copy with the app.foxdesk.net launch domain
Added the public FoxDesk Cloud SaaS website with light and dark product previews
Added a SaaS platform dashboard for creating workspaces, tracking usage, billing state, storage overage, and recent migrations
Added self-hosted to SaaS migration export packages for admins
Added SaaS migration import that creates a tenant workspace, remaps data IDs, imports attachments, and records migration history
Added deployment and migration documentation for Hetzner, Cloudflare, and self-hosted cutover
Added production nginx/Caddy proxy support for app.foxdesk.net and foxdesk.net launch routing
Fixed internal HTTPS redirect handling behind the Hetzner nginx reverse proxy
Updated the default extra storage overage price to EUR 1.90 per GB
Updated Playwright and smoke tests for the SaaS control plane login flow
